Engineering Colleges, IIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Technology, Roorkee
Also Known AsIITR
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1847
LocationRoorkee, Uttarakhand

IIT Roorkee: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also known as IIT Roorkee and IITR.

The Week Top Engineering Colleges India5 (2025)5 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must qualify the JEE (Main) exam and then appear for the JEE (Advanced) exam.
  • Candidates must secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII OR be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Advanced Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Advanced) through JoSAA Counselling.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Biosciences and Bioengineering
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Energy Engineering
  • Engineering Physics
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgical and Materials Engineering
  • Production and Industrial Engineering

B.Arch. - 5 Years

  • Architecture

Integrated M.Tech. - 5 Years

  • Geological Technology
  • Geophysical Technology

B.Sc. + M.Sc. (Dual Degree) - 5 Years

  • Chemical Sciences
  • Economics
  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Physics

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹3,000
One-Time Fees₹6,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,00,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹10,550
Total₹1,19,550

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹2,000
One-Time Fees₹4,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹5,000
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹2,500
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹20,250
Total₹33,750

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older
